testcase.name: Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 01. HOME PAGE LOAD & UI ELEMENTS VERIFICATION
testcase.system-out:
█ STEP: Loading Amazon home page
█ → INFO: Navigation Response: 202 → ASSERT: Current URL: https://www.amazon.com/
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Home page URL verified → ASSERT: Page Title:
█ ✗ ERROR: Home page verification failed: [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoBeGreaterThan[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m
Expected: > [32m0[39m Received: [31m0[39m
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-c4737-AD-UI-ELEMENTS-VERIFICATION\test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-c4737-AD-UI-ELEMENTS-VERIFICATION\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-c4737-AD-UI-ELEMENTS-VERIFICATION\error-context.md]]
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-c4737-AD-UI-ELEMENTS-VERIFICATION\trace.zip]]
testcase.failure:
amazon-advanced.test.js:52:3 › Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 01. HOME PAGE LOAD & UI ELEMENTS VERIFICATION
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThan(expected)
Expected: > 0 Received: 0
67 | const title = await page.title(); 68 | log.assert(`Page Title: ${title}`); > 69 | expect(title.length).toBeGreaterThan(0); | ^ 70 | log.success('Page title verified'); 71 | 72 | // Wait for main content at C:\Playwright Automation\Amazon\amazon-playwright-test\src\tests\amazon-advanced.test.js:69:28

testcase.name: Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 02. SEARCH FOR PRODUCT & VERIFY RESULTS
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 03. NAVIGATE TO PRODUCT & ADD TO CART
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 04. NAVIGATE TO SHOPPING CART
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 05. VERIFY NAVIGATION MENU & CATEGORIES
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 06. URL NAVIGATION VERIFICATION
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 07. SEARCH WITH FILTERS & VERIFICATION
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 08. PRODUCT AVAILABILITY & STOCK STATUS
